introSection: Belantis is an amusement park next to Leipzig, Germany. Covering 27 hectares, the park offers over 60 attractions, including four roller coasters.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The park was previously run by Parques Reunidos from 2018 to 2025; in April it was announced that Compagnie des Alpes had taken over ownership. They announced in December 2025 that they will convert it into a Parc Astérix.

sections.title: List of roller coasters
sections.content: Huracan has a steeper-than-vertical first hill and five inversions.

sections.title: List of water rides
sections.content: The water ride Fluch des Pharao starts from a pyramid with a height of 38 m.

sections.title: External links
sections.content:
* Official website
 * List of attractions at freizeitpark-welt.de

fullText:
Belantis is an amusement park next to Leipzig, Germany. Covering 27 hectares, the park offers over 60 attractions, including four roller coasters.

The park was previously run by Parques Reunidos from 2018 to 2025; in April it was announced that Compagnie des Alpes had taken over ownership. They announced in December 2025 that they will convert it into a Parc Astérix.

Huracan has a steeper-than-vertical first hill and five inversions.

The water ride Fluch des Pharao starts from a pyramid with a height of 38 m.

This list is incomplete.






 * Official website
 * List of attractions at freizeitpark-welt.de
